### 🛡️ All 8 Workstreams

**1A – Registry:** Active Dutch B.V., KvK 67740731, LEI fully corroborated. Corporate purpose: production, processing, trade of chemical products (mainly benzene) and energy products. Latest KvK publication September 2024.

**2A – LEI Confirms Parent-Child:** GLEIF data explicitly confirms COUNT Energy Trading SA (Geneva, LEI 506700KA77XLMOUW7028) **IS DIRECTLY CONSOLIDATED BY** this entity. Relationship from January 11, 2021. However, COUNT Energy Trading B.V. itself has declared LEI parent reporting exceptions — chain above BV level not LEI-confirmed.

**3A – Sanctions: ALL CLEAN** — OFAC SDN, OpenSanctions (1.27M records), UN SC: NO HITS on entity, Baaima, Dahlerup-Petersen, Bollebakker.

**4A – Adverse Media:** None. ESG-positive signals: Stage V barge COUNTESS MARIA, annual ESG reporting, Clariter €1.5B circular economy deal.

**5A – Litigation:** None found.

**6A – PEP:** All three key individuals — NOT PEPs. Consistent with April 2026 COUNT SA research.

**7A – Trade Risk:** Benzene in ARA region — standard European petrochemical trading, no controls at commercial grades. No sanctioned-country exposure.

**8A – Actions:** KvK UBO register entry; passport copies (Baaima, Dahlerup-Petersen, Bollebakker); product HS codes for specific trades.

**Cross-reference reports:** `count_energy_trading_CH_20260427.json` (Swiss SA) | `count_energy_distribution_bv_BE_20260506.json` (Belgian distribution)
